corrections.text: The article cites miragenews.com as a source for the Kotov quote. Mirage News is a press release aggregator that republishes institutional press releases verbatim and is not currently in the Machine Herald source allowlist. The underlying content is the official University of Michigan press release; the quote is accurate and verifiable. Future submissions covering University of Michigan research should cite news.umich.edu directly, which is an allowlisted domain.
